executives.name: Patrick P. Gelsinger
executives.background: Patrick P. Gelsinger has been a director and Intel’s CEO since February 2021. He has over 40 years of technology and leadership experience, including 30 years at Intel in various engineering and leadership roles. Prior to returning to Intel, he served as CEO of VMware, Inc. from 2012 to 2021 and as President and COO of EMC Corp.’s Information Infrastructure Products business from 2009 to 2012.

executives.name: David A. Zinsner
executives.background: David A. Zinsner has been Intel’s Executive Vice President and CFO since January 2022. Before joining Intel, he was Executive Vice President and CFO at Micron Technology, Inc. from 2018 to 2022. He also served as President and COO of Affirmed Networks and held CFO roles at Analog Devices and Intersil Corp.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Michelle Johnston Holthaus
executives.background: Michelle Johnston Holthaus is Executive Vice President and General Manager of the Client Computing Group. She has been with Intel since 1996, serving in various leadership roles in sales, marketing, and business management, including as Chief Revenue Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Manager, Client Computing Group

executives.name: Christoph Schell
executives.background: Christoph Schell is Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer. He joined Intel in 2022 from HP Inc., where he was Chief Commercial Officer. He has over 25 years of experience in the technology industry, including roles at Philips and Procter & Gamble.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer

executives.name: Safroadu Yeboah-Kodie
executives.background: Safroadu Yeboah-Kodie is Senior Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer. He joined Intel in 1999 and has held various technical and leadership positions, including Corporate Vice President in the Datacenter Group.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer

board_of_directors.name: Frank D. Yeary
board_of_directors.background: Frank D. Yeary has been a director since 2009 and Chairman since January 2023. He is Principal of Darwin Capital Advisors, LLC and was previously Executive Vice Chairman of CamberView Partners, LLC and Vice Chancellor of UC Berkeley.

board_of_directors.name: James J. Goetz
board_of_directors.background: James J. Goetz has been a director since 2019. He is a Partner at Sequoia Capital, a venture capital firm, which he joined in 2004. He previously held leadership positions at Entrust and VitalSigns Software.

board_of_directors.name: Alyssa Henry
board_of_directors.background: Alyssa Henry has been a director since 2020. She was previously CEO of Square (now Block, Inc.) and held leadership roles at Amazon Web Services and Microsoft.

board_of_directors.name: Omar Ishrak
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Omar Ishrak has been a director since 2017 and served as Chairman from 2020 to 2023. He was Chairman and CEO of Medtronic plc from 2011 to 2020.

board_of_directors.name: Risa Lavizzo-Mourey
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Risa Lavizzo-Mourey has been a director since 2018. She is President Emerita of the Robert Wood Johnson Foundation and a professor at the University of Pennsylvania.

board_of_directors.name: Barbara G. Novick
board_of_directors.background: Barbara G. Novick has been a director since 2022. She is a co-founder of BlackRock, Inc. and served as Vice Chairman until 2021.

board_of_directors.name: Gregory D. Smith
board_of_directors.background: Gregory D. Smith has been a director since 2021. He was previously CFO and Executive Vice President of Enterprise Operations at The Boeing Company.

board_of_directors.name: Lip-Bu Tan
board_of_directors.background: Lip-Bu Tan has been a director since 2022. He is Chairman of Walden International and was formerly CEO and Executive Chairman of Cadence Design Systems, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Dion J. Weisler
board_of_directors.background: Dion J. Weisler has been a director since 2020. He was President and CEO of HP Inc. from 2015 to 2019.
